description: Suggested DrSam authenticated SPA modules. Use as scope hints; refine against IR.

modules.title: Auth and onboarding entry
modules.purpose: Password reset (reset_pw), multi-step onboarding wizard (onboarding page), and index login/signup entry paths that gate access to the authenticated SPA.

modules.title: App shell and navigation
modules.purpose: Shared header, sidebar, offline banner, and cross-page chrome mounted on dashboard, journal, paths, settings, and chat.

modules.title: App enums and option sets
modules.purpose: Option sets driving onboarding questions, path tabs, settings tabs, coaching modes, load/health signals, and tier/state labels.

modules.title: Shared UI primitives
modules.purpose: Bubble styles to frontend design tokens; shared reusables (progress bar, score bar, session completion form).

modules.title: Dashboard home
modules.purpose: Main dashboard page after onboarding: daily overview, check-in entry points, and navigation hub.

modules.title: Journal and check-ins
modules.purpose: Journal page for daily check-ins, journal entries, milestones, and relapse tracking.

modules.title: Guided paths
modules.purpose: Paths page for guided path enrollment, path sessions, and session completion flows.

modules.title: AI chat and messaging
modules.purpose: Chat page and RE-chat reusable: conversation UI, message threads, and chat workflows.

modules.title: Crisis support surfaces
modules.purpose: Crisis support reusable embedded in settings and other flows.

modules.title: Settings and account
modules.purpose: Settings page: profile, subscription, notifications, privacy, workplace, and admin tabs.

modules.title: Backend API surface
modules.purpose: Incoming API events and external HTTP calls from IR mapped to Supabase edge functions or frontend fetch patterns.
